# Royal Haven Hotel

> A luxury hotel located in New Delhi offering premium rooms, fine dining, spa and conference facilities.

## Pages
- [Home](https://royal-haven-hotel.netlify.app/)
- [About](https://royal-haven-hotel.netlify.app/about.html)
- [Rooms](https://royal-haven-hotel.netlify.app/rooms.html)
- [Facilities](https://royal-haven-hotel.netlify.app/facilities.html)
- [Booking](https://royal-haven-hotel.netlify.app/booking.html)
- [Contact](https://royal-haven-hotel.netlify.app/contact.html)
